name: global_border_width
description: Global border width. Use it to define the width of borders across the UI.

name: global_border_style
description: Global border style. Use it to define the style of borders across the UI.

description: Global breakpoint XS (mobile devices) maximum width. Use it to define the maximum width for XS screens.

description: Global breakpoint SM (tablet devices) minimum width. Use it to define the minimum width for SM screens.

name: global_breakpoint_sm_max-width
description: Global breakpoint SM (tablet devices) maximum width. Use it to define the maximum width for SM screens.

name: global_breakpoint_md_min-width
description: Global breakpoint MD (desktop devices - viewing not a full screen browser window on a laptop) minimum width. Use it to define the minimum width for MD screens.

name: global_breakpoint_md_max-width
description: Global breakpoint MD (desktop devices - viewing not a full screen browser window on a laptop) maximum width. Use it to define the maximum width for MD screens.

name: global_breakpoint_lg_min-width
description: Global breakpoint LG (large desktop devices - typical external screens in the office) minimum width. Use it to define the minimum width for LG screens.

name: global_breakpoint_lg_max-width
description: Global breakpoint LG (large desktop devices - typical external screens in the office) maximum width. Use it to define the maximum width for LG screens.

name: global_breakpoint_xl_min-width
description: Global breakpoint XL (extra large desktop devices - wide screens and high resolution screens.) minimum width. Use it to define the minimum width for XL screens.

name: global_link_inline_text-decoration
description: Global link inline text decoration. Use it to define the text decoration for inline links.

name: global_link_inline_hover_text-decoration
description: Global link inline hover text decoration. Use it to define the text decoration for inline links when hovered.

name: global_link_stand-alone_text-decoration
description: Global link stand-alone text decoration. Use it to define the text decoration for stand-alone links.

name: global_link_stand-alone_hover_text-decoration
description: Global link stand-alone hover text decoration. Use it to define the text decoration for stand-alone links when hovered.

name: global_transition_slow_duration
description: Global slow transition duration. Use it to define the duration of slow transitions across the UI.

name: global_transition_slow_timing
description: Global slow transition timing function. Use it to define the timing function for slow transitions across the UI.

name: global_transition_medium_duration
description: Global medium transition duration. Use it to define the duration of medium transitions across the UI.

name: global_transition_medium_timing
description: Global medium transition timing function. Use it to define the timing function for medium transitions across the UI.

name: global_transition_fast_duration
description: Global fast transition duration. Use it to define the duration of fast transitions across the UI.

name: global_transition_fast_timing
description: Global fast transition timing function. Use it to define the timing function for fast transitions across the UI.
